name: 动量
subject: physics
curriculum_points:
1.2.B.3
Average acceleration is the change in velocity divided by the interval of time in which that change in velocity occurs.
Relevant equation:

1.3.A.2
For constant acceleration, three kinematic equations can be used to describe instantaneous linear motion in one dimension:
v =v +a t
x x0 x
1 2
x =x +v t+ a t
0 x0 2 x
v2 =v2 +2 a( −xx )
x x0 x 0
Note: The equations above are written to indicate motion in the x-direction, but these equations can be used in any single dimension as appropriate.

1.3.A.4.ii
An object’s instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velocity, which is equal to the slope of a line tangent to a point on a graph of the object’s velocity as a function of time.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Matter.js 碰撞模拟：两球碰撞观察动量守恒，可调质量/初速度，显示动量条形图
interactive_resources.description: Matter.js 动量守恒碰撞模拟
PhET 碰撞实验室：动量守恒验证（中文版）
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「动量」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.B.3
Average acceleration is the change in velocity divided by the interval of time in which that change in velocity …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.3.A.2
For constant acceleration, three kinematic equations can be used to desc… 对理解「动量」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
